ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Settlement And Information To Mr. Ferdon
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Guardian, Personal Representative); Dennis Vann (Counsel for the Bewley Heirs); James Millard (Counsel for Shirley Herrera).

Mr. Ferdon began his presentation by objecting to the late filing of Mr. Millard's brief and proceeded to address alleged irregularities with respect to the character of the real property loan and the processing of the escrow upon sale of the real property. Mr. Vann briefly noted his concurrence with Mr. Ferdon and his clients' support for the distribution scheme proposed by the Public Guardian. Mr. Millard presented his rebuttal to the foregoing presentations.

After further discussion and questioning by the Court (concerning the lack of representation by or for Budget National Finance), Mr. Millard represented to the Court for the record that his client would stipulate to the treatment of the $60,000 Budget National Finance loan (and the ostensibly erroneous payment thereof by the escrow company) as an offset to or advance of Ms. Herrera's share of distributions from the Estate. With that, the Court then queried counsel as to whether the only outstanding issue concerned the Public Guardian's fees and if so, whether counsel would submit the matter on the pleadings and the presentations thus made. Upon the stipulation and consent of all counsel, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Karla Davis CSR# 12998; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Quint (Counsel for Budget National Finance).

After discussion with counsel concerning the nature of previous representation of Budget (by special appearance and without retainer agreement), the Court granted the Petition, signing the Order for same in open Court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
